asset.title: Startup Diligence War Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough effectively demonstrates a multi-lane agent workspace for startup diligence, showing real-time spreadsheet updates, agent traces, and human-in-the-loop approval gates.

featureClarity.evidence: The interface clearly shows the integration of spreadsheets, agent lanes, and execution traces, though the layout is dense.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the end-to-end flow from pending accounts to completed enrichment and draft handoffs.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface, though the high density of panels can feel slightly overwhelming.

consistency.evidence: Aligns well with the product's core concepts of shared workspaces, public/private agents, and visible traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Shows authentic UI interactions, live status changes, and realistic data inputs.

legibility.evidence: Most text is readable, though small spreadsheet cells and log entries require close attention.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly applicable to financial analysts and GTM teams performing structured company research.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts agents generating drafts for human approval rather than executing actions autonomously.

observedEvidence: Copilot panel with public and private lanes
Live room trace showing background agent execution
Handoff panel with draft export options

defects.observed: Small text size in spreadsheet cells and status chips limits quick readability.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the default font size or apply a subtle zoom on the active panel.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Collaborative startup diligence room featuring multi-lane agent execution, live spreadsheet synchronization, and human-in-the-loop approval gates.
